functional.description: Capture execution metrics for all agent invocations (latency, success/failure, resource usage).
Store metrics in the database within 1 second of collection.
Display live agent status and historical performance in the dashboard.
Trigger alerts for agent failures or errors.
Apply metrics retention policy of 30 days.

nonFunctional.description: Collection overhead must be < 5ms per agent execution.

constraints.description: Async batch writing (every 5s) to avoid blocking execution.

assumptions.description: Agent execution can be wrapped in a middleware or decorator.

domainModel.description: Data record of a single agent execution.

interactions.description: Start execution -> Start Timer -> Execute Logic -> End Timer -> Capture Result -> Batch to DB.

edgeCases.handling: Log error locally and retry next cycle.

terminology.definition: Grouping multiple metric records before writing to DB to reduce I/O overhead.
